name: KERNL
description: KERNL is an MCP server providing session management and workspace tools for Claude Desktop. It persists cross-session state and exposes workspace tools to all Claude environments.
purpose: Provide persistent session memory and workspace tooling to every Claude Desktop session across all environments.
success_criteria: Used in every active Claude session without friction
Zero session cold-boot amnesia for known projects
tagline: Session memory and workspace tooling for Claude.
notes: Open source. Lives at D:/Projects/Project Mind/kernl-mcp. Chrome profile: DKdKe.
author: dk-001
